query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): FLUNCH TRAITEUR and its website http://www.flunch-traiteur.fr.
Optionnaly here is the address IMMEUBLE PERICENTRE 49 BOULEVARD VAN GOGH, VILLENEUVE D ASCQ 59650, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
### Executive Summary

Flunch Traiteur is not an independent establishment; it is operated by SAS FLUNCH, which is a subsidiary of Agapes Restauration, the food service branch of the Association Familiale Mulliez (Mulliez Group) [Le propriétaire de Flunch, en difficulté, a privilégié les dividendes aux investissements selon un audit](https://www.lefigaro.fr/flash-eco/le-proprietaire-de-flunch-en-difficulte-a-privilegie-les-dividendes-aux-investissements-audit-20210416), [Flunch la chaîne phare des menus à volonté des Mulliez va fermer quatre restaurants](https://www.lavoixdunord.fr/1505288/article/2024-09-24/flunch-la-chain-phare-des-menus-volonte-va-fermer-quatre-restaurants). Based on the broadest definition of the parent group's footprint (including both owned and franchised locations across all brands), the highest total number of locations operated by the Agapes Restauration group is **526** [Agapes Restauration : ventes en repli de 1 % sur 2013 - Le blog Mulliez, de Bertrand Gobin](https://www.leblogmulliez.com/article-agapes-restauration-ventes-en-repli-de-1-sur-2013-122817856.html).

### Corporate Affiliation and Structure

Flunch Traiteur operates within a highly structured corporate ecosystem:
*   **Legal Entity:** The direct legal entity behind Flunch Traiteur is SAS FLUNCH, registered with the RCS Lille under the number B 320 772 510, and headquartered at 4 rue de l’Espoir, 59260 LEZENNES [flunch Traiteur : Mentions Légales](https://www.flunch-traiteur.fr/mentions-legales). The company is presided over by Hervé Rampal [flunch Traiteur : Mentions Légales](https://www.flunch-traiteur.fr/mentions-legales). 
*   **Parent Group:** SAS FLUNCH is directly owned by Agapes Restauration (the Agapes group) [Le propriétaire de Flunch, en difficulté, a privilégié les dividendes aux investissements selon un audit](https://www.lefigaro.fr/flash-eco/le-proprietaire-de-flunch-en-difficulte-a-privilegie-les-dividendes-aux-investissements-audit-20210416). 
*   **Ultimate Parent:** Agapes Restauration serves as the food branch of the Association Familiale Mulliez (AFM), integrating Flunch into a massive retail network that includes Auchan, Decathlon, Leroy Merlin, Boulanger, Kiabi, and Saint Maclou [Flunch la chaîne phare des menus à volonté des Mulliez va fermer quatre restaurants](https://www.lavoixdunord.fr/1505288/article/2024-09-24/flunch-la-chain-phare-des-menus-volonte-va-fermer-quatre-restaurants).
*   **Sister Brands:** Through Agapes Restauration, Flunch is affiliated with 8 to 9 distinct restaurant brands, including Les 3 Brasseurs, Il Ristorante, Salad&Co, Pizza Paï, O’Sushi, and So Good [Le témoignage de notre client Agapes | Lively Software](https://lively-software.com/temoignages-clients/agapes/).

### Group Size and Location Count

In accordance with the requirement to report the highest total number of locations found across all sources (owned plus franchised), the Agapes Restauration group reached a peak size of **526 restaurants** in 2013 [Agapes Restauration : ventes en repli de 1 % sur 2013 - Le blog Mulliez, de Bertrand Gobin](https://www.leblogmulliez.com/article-agapes-restauration-ventes-en-repli-de-1-sur-2013-122817856.html). 

**Historical Peak (Maximum Count):**
*   In 2013, the 526 locations spanned 12 different brands and explicitly included 32 Quick franchises operated by the group [Agapes Restauration : ventes en repli de 1 % sur 2013 - Le blog Mulliez, de Bertrand Gobin](https://www.leblogmulliez.com/article-agapes-restauration-ventes-en-repli-de-1-sur-2013-122817856.html). 

**Recent Group Footprint:**
*   More recent reporting indicates Agapes Restauration operates 380 restaurants globally, comprising 356 locations in France and 24 abroad (including Italy and Canada) [Agapes Restauration fluidifie sa gestion de notes de frais grâce à sa digitalisation](https://www.cio-online.com/actualites/lire-agapes-restauration-fluidifie-sa-gestion-de-notes-de-frais-grace-a-sa-digitalisation-12904.html).
*   The group employs approximately 11,925 staff members and serves roughly 14,504,000 meals annually [Agapes Restauration — Wikipédia](https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Agapes_Restauration), [Agapes Restauration – Marques de restauration et de préparation culinaire](https://www.agapes.fr/).

**Brand-Level Breakdown:**
*   **Flunch:** The official Flunch website currently lists 130 active restaurants [Contact - Flunch.fr](https://www.flunch.fr/contact/). Historically, the brand peaked at 228 restaurants in 2020 (which included 67 franchises) [Agapes Restauration doit impérativement se réinventer](https://www.agra.fr/agra-innovation/agapes-restauration-doit-imperativement-se-reinventer).
*   **Les 3 Brasseurs:** Operates more than 92 restaurant-microbreweries globally [Agapes Restauration | LinkedIn](https://fr.linkedin.com/company/agapesrestaurations).
*   **Salad & Co:** Currently operates 14 establishments [BFM Grand Lille/JDE] Salad & Co : "Via la franchise, nous allons accélérer avec l'ouverture de 10 restaurants par an" - Le Journal des Entreprises](https://www.lejournaldesentreprises.com/article/bfm-grand-lillejde-salad-co-la-franchise-nous-allons-accelerer-avec-louverture-de-10-restaurants-par-2118297).
*   **Il Ristorante:** Projected to operate 26 establishments by the end of 2021 [Agapes Restauration : Infos du groupe de l'Association familiale Mulliez - Néorestauration](https://www.neorestauration.com/agapes-restauration/).
*   **Amarine:** Reached 14 locations before the Mulliez group closed the brand entirely in 2019 [Agapes Restauration — Wikipédia](https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Agapes_Restauration).

### Flunch Traiteur Operations

Flunch Traiteur does not primarily operate as a standalone chain of physical storefronts; rather, it is an integrated service utilizing the existing Flunch restaurant network:
*   **Withdrawal Points:** Flunch Traiteur operates through "points de retrait" located directly within Flunch restaurants [Traiteur Dunkerque - flunch Traiteur](https://www.flunch-traiteur.fr/traiteur/flunch-dunkerque). 
*   **Delivery Network:** All Flunch restaurants offer Flunch Traiteur delivery services to neighboring municipalities, covering major cities like Paris, Lyon, Nantes, Bordeaux, and Rennes [flunch Traiteur - Livraison et Paiement](https://www.flunch-traiteur.fr/retrait-livraison-traiteur/), [Traiteur Paris - flunch Traiteur](https://www.flunch-traiteur.fr/traiteur-paris).
*   **Dedicated Facilities:** The brand operates at least one dedicated 'Atelier' location in Marcq-en-Barœul, which handles delivery and pickup specifically for the Lille metropolitan area [Restaurant Traiteur - Flunch Traiteur Atelier Lille](https://www.flunch-traiteur.fr/traiteur/flunch-traiteur-atelier-lille).

### Gaps and Limitations
*   While the highest historical count for the Agapes Restauration group is definitively 526 locations (from 2013), the exact real-time aggregate count for the year 2026 across all 8-9 currently active brands is not available in the provided findings. 
*   The findings note a discrepancy in the share capital of SAS FLUNCH, with legal notices stating €13,095,100.00 and a secondary source citing €67,105,080 as of December 2023.
*   The exact current breakdown of owned versus franchised locations for the entire Agapes group is not detailed in the findings, though historical data confirms both models are utilized heavily.
